items.title: Trey Kaufman-Renn Helps No. 7 Purdue Rout Rival Indiana, 93-64
items.description: Trey Kaufman-Renn scored 20 points and Braden Smith added 15 points and eight assists, helping No. 7 Purdue rout rival Indiana 93-64.
